name: default
label: Default
description: The original anchor prompts repackaged as a one-variant-per-slot pack. Always present after bootstrap; required by the dropdowns first option.

stylized_base.label: Stylized base
stylized_base.prompt: Create an image of this exact character in this style.

turnaround.label: Turnaround
turnaround.prompt: Create a full body turnaround sheet of this exact character: four full-body poses on a pure white background — front view, left profile, back view, right profile — evenly spaced in a clean horizontal row, consistent lighting and style, no background noise, no shadows, same proportions and detailing across all views.

t_pose.label: T-pose
t_pose.prompt: Full body T-pose of this exact character on a pure white background, arms straight out horizontally, legs together, neutral expression, even soft studio light, no shadows, no background detail, consistent style.

side_3q.label: Side three-quarter
side_3q.prompt: Three-quarter side view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, even soft studio light, consistent style, no shadows.

back_3q.label: Back three-quarter
back_3q.prompt: Three-quarter back view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, even soft studio light, consistent style, no shadows.

extreme_closeup.label: Extreme close-up
extreme_closeup.prompt: Extreme close-up of this exact character's face, eyes and upper nose filling the frame, sharp detail, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

closeup.label: Close-up
closeup.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character, head and shoulders, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

mid.label: Mid
mid.prompt: Mid-shot of this exact character from the waist up, standing relaxed, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character with a calm neutral expression, mouth closed, eyes forward, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

smiling.label: Smiling
smiling.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character with a warm relaxed smile, lips closed or barely parted, eyes lit, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

laughing.label: Laughing
laughing.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character laughing genuinely, mouth open, eyes crinkled, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

angry.label: Angry
angry.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character looking angry, brow furrowed, jaw set, hard side light from the left, plain neutral background, consistent style.

surprised.label: Surprised
surprised.prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character looking surprised, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, bright even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

walking.label: Walking
walking.prompt: Full body shot of this exact character walking forward in mid-stride, natural gait, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style, no shadows on the floor.

running.label: Running
running.prompt: Full body shot of this exact character running, mid-stride, arms in motion, slight forward lean, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.

sitting.label: Sitting
sitting.prompt: Full body shot of this exact character sitting on a simple wooden stool, relaxed posture, hands resting, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.

leaning.label: Leaning
leaning.prompt: Full body shot of this exact character leaning against an unseen wall, weight on one leg, arms relaxed, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.
